description: Completed direct-provider debt retirements. Entries remain linked to the immutable audit baseline.

entries.reason: The authenticated Gateway/RPC cutover was verified for MCP day result/add/open/status. The legacy backend-to-Edge caller and unreachable direct-table open/status implementations were removed; direct internal fallback now fails closed instead of restoring retired mutation paths.
The public mcp-day-8b3 and mcp-day-followup mutation implementations were replaced by credential-free HTTP 410 retirement stubs after canonical backend cutover.

Both duplicate Next-server snapshot writers and the unreachable legacy direct-table AI-result writer were removed. Snapshot and AI-result writes now enter through the authenticated Foundation Gateway and service-role-only RPCs owned by the backend session-report aggregate.

Report setting group and item writes now enter through the authenticated Foundation Gateway and four service-role-only RPCs. Direct PostgREST writes were removed from the transitional transport and legacy backend while the existing read contract remains unchanged.

Field-check updates now require an existing result and use the typed service-role-only RPC with row locking, status normalization and Foundation context. The unreachable field-check create fallback and duplicate broken market-report route were removed, and direct table mutation privileges wererevoked from browser roles.
Seven unused legacy route-settings POST writers were removed; required GET readers and the active typed report-settings owner remain.
